promoted_facts.fact: Blackstone acquisition enterprise value: $8.0 billion with $250M earnout
Aircraft assets: $41.7M + $41M construction-in-progress aircraft at JMFS level
Securitization debt tranches: Series 2019 $500M (ARD Feb 2027), Series 2021 $500M (ARD Feb 2027/2029), Series 2024 $750M (ARD Feb 2032)
Variable Funding Notes: $100M revolving facility issued as part of Blackstone transaction
Entities transferred to Seller post-acquisition: 2251 Landmark Place LLC and Farnborough LLC (~$79M P&E, ~$56M notes payable)
Notes receivable to franchisees: $7.4M at 3-10% interest, secured by franchisee assets, maturing through 2037
Cash equivalents $764.7M at JMFS consolidated (primarily from Blackstone acquisition proceeds)
VIE assessment: Certain franchisees identified as variable interest entities but Company not primary beneficiary — not consolidated
Vendor receivables $21.1M included in accounts receivable (supply chain rebates)
Crisis Management Event clause: Franchisor may control all media communication, temporarily close restaurant, engage professionals at franchisee's expense
Vendor payment default: Past-due vendor/supplier payments constitute FA breach
Guaranty is personal, unconditional, joint and several, includes all monetary and non-monetary obligations including non-compete, with all defenses waived
